GAP_001.gap_was: No explicit logout / token revocation endpoint documented
GAP_001.finding: POST /api/user/logout IS implemented in UserController.Logout(). Calls _authenticationService.Logout(userId) which invalidates refresh token server-side. Access token remains valid until 15-min TTL (by design).

GAP_002.gap_was: Password reset token storage mechanism not clear in schema
GAP_002.finding: PasswordResetToken (Guid?) and DatePasswordResetTokenExpiresUtc (DateTime?) stored directly on the User entity. No separate table.
GAP_002.remaining_concern: Guid is predictable length — TD: use 256-bit CryptoRandom token instead for stronger reset URLs

GAP_003.gap_was: TOTP secret key storage location not visible in schema
GAP_003.finding: AuthenticatorSecret is a string property on User entity (User.cs). Stored as plain string — no encryption at rest.
GAP_003.remaining_concern: TD_005: Should encrypt with IDataProtectionProvider before persisting — rebuild must address this.

GAP_004.gap: MFA fallback if user loses 2FA device
GAP_004.finding: No explicit recovery code mechanism found in source code. NudgeType.AuthenticatorApp exists (prompts setup). ResetPhone/PhoneCode on User allows SMS fallback if authenticatorApp was configured separately.
GAP_004.inferred: Admin can manually reset 2FA by clearing AuthenticatorSecret on User entity (via admin panel). No code-level recovery flow found.
GAP_004.rebuild_recommendation: Implement explicit recovery codes (array of one-time-use codes) stored hashed on User entity for production rebuild.

GAP_005.finding: All 5 NudgeType values mapped from nudgeType.ts: MessageSendToOwner (messaging), Eboks (messaging), Voice (messaging), Survey (cross-domain), AuthenticatorApp (identity_access). See BEH_007 for full API and behavior.
